verification_scope: Every formation/set and play card that is visibly readable in the uploaded video.
critical_limitation: The video shows only the currently visible play cards for each formation while the top-right count indicates many formations contain additional off-screen plays. Therefore this transcript verifies all visible cards but cannot prove or enumerate the complete Oregon playbook.
required_next_capture: For a complete playbook, record each formation while scrolling through every play card in that formation from first to last.
